title: stellaria longifolia var. typica
intro: Stellaria longifolia var. typica is a plant species commonly known as the long-leaved starwort or common starwort, belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Stellaria longifolia var. typica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be dried or used fresh in various medicinal applications.
